Closes the test gap from replacing AiChatContent — this behavior
was previously tested at the integration level but the test was
removed during the component swap. Now tested at the
AiChatCodeSegment level where the logic lives.

commits.subject: chore(ai-chat): remove dead renderAiChatMarkdown and getCodeFromClosestCodeBlock
commits.body:
Both were only used by the old AiChatContent.svelte. Their behaviors
are covered by aiChatSegments.test.ts, aiChatSanitize.test.ts, and
AiChatCodeSegment.test.ts in the new architecture.

commits.author: Matteo Greco
commits.subject: refactor(ai-chat): replace AiChatContent with refactored version
commits.body:
Remove old AiChatContent.svelte and rename AiChatContentNew.svelte
in its place. Remove AI_CHAT_CONTENT_REFACTOR feature flag and
conditional in ScreenElements. Remove 3 tests now covered at the
AiChatCodeSegment level.

Closes ETC-590

ETC-602.title: .replace() modifier
ETC-602.description:
Very simple, very powerful modifiert that would help alot. (Has been requested by a handful of users and just makes sense)

* User can use the .replace() modifier on dynamic data of type string
* User can define a substring that shall be replaced with another substring e.g. .replace("foo", "bar")
* The replaced string gets rendered correctly in the builder, frontend and gutenberg

Consideration: ".replace" and ".replaceAll" ?

ETC-603.title: Scroll Into View Behaviour of Components
ETC-603.description: We currently have some buggy behaviour for scrolling components into view. Especailly causing issues when using the HTML panel.

ETC-590.title: Replace AiChatContent.svelte with ...New.svelte
ETC-590.description:
the current stack around
AiChatContent.svelte and aiChatMarkdown.ts was refactored


new files:

* aiChatSanitize.ts: ( just the xss stuff )
* aiChatSegments.ts: ( +/- the functionality from aiChatMarkdown ) it parses the tokens, based on the token info creates segments either for chat or for code
* AiChatContentNew.svelte:  the same as current one with the refactored components instead of aiChatMarkdown.ts
* AiChatCodeSegment.svelte: the component that renders the codeblocks + the buttons
* AiChatSegmentsRenderer.svelte: the component that renders either chat or code based on the segments information

Extras:

* ScreenElements.svelte.ts: holds the default AiChatContent or the new AiChatContentNew.svelte by a feature flag `AI_CHAT_CONTENT_REFACTOR` TO discard.

The feature flag and the AiChatContentNew.svelte were used because i wanted feedback from Reinhard, and because of the need to put the code in main without affect a release

ETC-580.title: Add Boolean Property Instance Input
ETC-580.description:
The design shall follow the new design in figma

The user sees a boolean toggle

The user can  switch the toggle and it will propagate to the canvas

ETC-581.title: Add Select Property Instance Input
ETC-581.description:
The design shall follow the new design in figma

The user sees a select field

The options in the select field mirror the options defined in the editor

Selecting an option propagates it to the canvas

ETC-586.title: Add Repeater Property Instance Input
ETC-586.description:
The design shall follow the new design form Figma

The user can see a collapsible group with the repeater name

The user can collapse the group to hide it

The user can add items to the repeater

The user can delete items in the repeater

For every item the nested properties are rendered according to their type
